text: I'd like to build a couple carbon tow or ribbons heaters  make it to Hank on the wall, with aluminum foil behind it, being about 18"x 60" to 36" x 72"  +/- ,. Set it on low, let it run all night, on the long winter nights,  charging the batteries, or just preventing their discharging, so the sun can charge the bank quickly the next morning!!   Sorry I'm rambling!!
